title: JAOPCAGT
description: Just A Ore Processing Compatibility Attempt: GregTech
body:
JAOPCAGT (Just A Ore Processing Compatibility Attempt: GregTech) is a collection of addons to JAOPCA that adds ore processing compatibility to different versions of GregTech as multiple versions of GregTech exist for a single version of Minecraft.
Please make sure that you download the correct version of the mod for the version of GregTech that you are using.

List of JAOPCAGT 1.7.10 versions:

  • JAOPCAGT4 for GregTech 4
  • JAOPCAGT5 for GregTech 5 Unofficial
  • JAOPCAGT6 is not planned.

List of JAOPCAGT 1.12.2 versions:

  • JAOPCAGTCE for GregTech Community Edition
  • JAOPCAGTCEu for GregTech CE: Unofficial

List of JAOPCAGT 1.19.2 versions:

  • JAOPCAGTCEu for GregTechCEu Modern

List of JAOPCAGT 1.20.1 versions:

  • JAOPCAGTCEu for GregTechCEu Modern
